recovered_memory: Cloudflare finalizer capability exists but authoritative workflow integration remained unproven.
Repeated-trial inference is now constrained by preregistered protocol and ledger integrity requirements.
verification: Artifact is valid JSON and each observed record cites immutable commit identifiers plus an explicit review route.
privacy_boundary: Public repository metadata only; no raw chats, health data, credentials, personal identifiers, or unreviewed uploads included.
limits: No claim is made that Cloudflare workflow integration or deployment succeeded.
No claim is made that the acoustic experiment proves audibility, perception, or causation.
M-002 is proposed through an additive queue update rather than modification of the shared canonical queue.
